s20.short: Compact Bluetooth nano diffuser — up to 300 sq ft, whisper-quiet, tabletop or wall-mounted.
s20.full:
The Scent World S20 Nano Diffuser is a compact, Bluetooth-controlled scent diffuser with a 100 ml bottle and dual power options (3 D batteries or USB-C).
With 5 working periods and 20 intensity levels, it delivers precise, even cold-air scenting for personal and compact commercial spaces.
Best for living rooms, spas, clinics, public restrooms and shops — clean, modern and quiet at under 30 dBA.

s30.short: Air-pump nano diffuser for medium spaces — 1,435–2,870 sq ft, 200 ml, HVAC-ready.
s30.full:
The Scent World S30 Nano Diffuser uses air-pump nebulization for even, waterless scenting across 1,435–2,870 sq ft.
A 200 ml bottle and low consumption (0.03–1.00 ml/hour) make it efficient for high-traffic spaces, with HVAC or portable installation.
Best for big living rooms, spas, clinics, shops and high-traffic commercial spaces — quiet at under 40 dB.

s200.short: Commercial HVAC diffuser with smart app control — up to 17,945 sq ft, 500 ml, anti-theft lock.
s200.full:
The Scent World S200 Commercial Aroma Diffuser is a medium-capacity system with smart app control and built-in HVAC compatibility, covering up to 17,945 sq ft.
Schedule diffusion and adjust intensity remotely; a 500 ml bottle and anti-theft lock make it practical for unattended commercial use.
Best for offices, clinics, reception areas, boutique shops and other medium commercial spaces.

car-diffuser.short: Compact in-car diffuser with automatic activation — durable metal body, USB-powered, multiple colours.
car-diffuser.full:
The SW Car Scent Diffuser is a compact in-car fragrance diffuser with automatic activation and a durable metal body, covering small spaces up to ~180 sq ft.
Designed for convenient daily scenting on the go, it runs on DC 5V and comes in several colour options — Blue, Gold, Green, Red and Rose Gold.
Best for car interiors and other very small personal spaces.
car-diffuser.spec_coverage: Vehicle interior · up to ~180 sq ft

car-gift-set.short: The Car Scent Diffuser paired with 5 curated fragrance oils in a luxury gift box.
car-gift-set.full:
The Scent World Car Diffuser Gift Set pairs our compact in-car diffuser with five curated fragrance oils, presented in a premium magnetic gift box.
With automatic activation and a durable metal body, the diffuser covers small spaces up to ~180 sq ft — ideal for the car or a personal nook.
A thoughtful, ready-to-gift introduction to Scent World fragrance.
car-gift-set.spec_coverage: Vehicle interior · up to ~180 sq ft
